title: UMPQUA COMMUNITY COLLEGE - 211info
text: UMPQUA COMMUNITY COLLEGE UMPQUA COMMUNITY COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Umpqua Community College's Adult Basic Skills Development program helps adults who want to get their GED, improve their reading and math skills, prepare for college or a career, and learn English as a Second Language (ESL). Offers classes for people who have earned their diploma or GED and want to improve their basic education skills. Classes are held in various areas, including Roseburg, Glide, and Tri City/Myrtle Creek. ESL classes are held in Roseburg and Tri City/Myrtle Creek. Free tutoring program, school-to-career program, and several computer labs also availble to students. 1140 Umpqua College Road Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Age 16 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 440-4600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-4600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit the website for more information or to register. Orientation required for all programs. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMPQUA COMMUNITY COLLEGE
